title: ATTM - All The Tech Mods
description: All the crazy tech, with Create at the center of your automation chaos!
body:
# **ATTM** - All The Tech Mods
Step into the ultimate tech sandbox! **ATTM** puts **Create** at the heart of your factory adventures, letting you craft insane contraptions, crazy automation setups, and jaw-dropping machinery. But don’t stop there – we’ve packed in **over 100 mods** to expand your engineering playground, from power systems to high-tech tools. Whether you’re a gearhead, a redstone wizard, or just love tinkering, **ATTM** is your go-to modpack for building, automating, and optimizing like a true tech master.

**Note:** Make sure you allocate at least **2GB of RAM** to Minecraft.
